name: PaloAltoCortexXDR_initiate_forensics
author: Joe Lazaro; Fabien Bloume, StrangeBee
description: Initiate forensics triage collection on endpoints identified by hostname or IP list

configurationItems.name: advanced_security
configurationItems.description: Set True if the API key was generated with Advanced security level. False for a Standard security key.

configurationItems.name: api_host
configurationItems.description: Fully qualified domain name for the API host. Example: api-example.xdr.us.paloaltonetworks.com

configurationItems.name: collector_uuid
configurationItems.description: Optional UUID of the triage configuration preset to use. If not specified, the XDR default configuration is used.
